confidenceNote: GIFT Nifty slides -0.42% overnight matching US tech profit booking; India VIX rises slightly to 14.1.

bullets.title: US Tech Pullback
bullets.globalTrend: US technology shares consolidates with Nasdaq falling 0.85% as investors lock in recent gains.
bullets.globalTrendSimple: US tech stocks fell slightly last night as investors sold shares to secure their profits.
bullets.indianImpact: Puts short-term downward pressure on local IT giants (TCS, Infosys) due to client demand exposure.
bullets.indianImpactSimple: This is likely to cause share prices of TCS and Infosys to open lower this morning.

companiesAffected.name: Infosys Ltd.
companiesAffected.reason: Tracking US ADR pullback in tech sector.
companiesAffected.actionableGuidance: Wait for Nifty support to stabilize near ₹1,480 before initiating buy orders.

sectors.name: Information Technology
sectors.reason: Weak US cues overnight will lead to profit-booking in IT stocks.

suggestedAction.strategy: Expect a soft opening below yesterday's close. Let the initial gap down settle before taking defensive longs.
suggestedAction.strategySimple: The market is expected to open lower. Do not buy immediately at 9:15 AM; wait for prices to stabilize.
suggestedAction.sectorFocus: Pharma and FMCG are expected to act as defensive sectors.
suggestedAction.riskWarning: Avoid aggressive long positions until support levels are defended.
suggestedAction.riskWarningSimple: Do not take big risks buying stocks today until we see if the market stops falling.
